introduction: As the virtual healthcare landscape continues to evolve rapidly, it's crucial that we adapt our marketing strategies to attract new customers. This presentation will discuss potential approaches to achieving this goal.

subsections.heading: Trends in Virtual Healthcare Adoption
subsections.content:
• Notably, in-person marketing efforts such as representation at universities and doctors' offices have proven effective, with a 60% increase in customer conversion in May 2024.
• These in-person encounters demonstrate a clear advantage over digital ad engagements in customer acquisition.
• As part of our marketing strategy, we need to leverage this success and increase our in-person marketing activities.
• This could take the form of partnerships with educational institutions and healthcare providers, providing potential customers with first-hand knowledge of MediConn services.
• Virtual healthcare adoption trends suggest a well-optimized website is crucial to our marketing plan, especially for mobile users accessing telehealth services.
• In conjunction with our digital presence, the combination of online and offline marketing strategies could further enhance our customer conversion rates.
• It is imperative to maintain a balance between our in-person marketing efforts and digital presence, tailoring strategies to meet the evolving needs of prospective customers in the virtual healthcare landscape.
subsections.justification: These points highlight the importance of in-person marketing for customer conversion and suggest strategies to leverage this for increased customer acquisition.

subsections.heading: MediConn's Current Marketing Performance
subsections.content:
• MediConn's website traffic increased by 15% in 2024
• The company's blog posts generated 20% more engagement in 2025
• Social media followers increased by 50% in 2025
• Email marketing campaigns achieved a 25% open rate in 2026
• Whitepapers and case studies saw a 30% increase in downloads in 2026
• The bounce rate on the website reduced to 40% in 2026
• Average session duration on the website increased to 5 minutes in 2026
subsections.justification: This slide reports metrics about MediConn's current marketing performance, not strategies for attracting new customers. It references related but non-essential business metrics.

subsections.heading: Innovative Marketing Strategies for Healthcare
subsections.content:
• Influencer marketing has gained popularity in healthcare promotion
• Personalized email marketing is effective for patient retention
• Virtual reality is being used for patient education and engagement
• Content marketing is a powerful tool for establishing thought leadership
• Social media marketing is crucial for reaching younger demographics
• Podcasts are an emerging platform for healthcare discussions
• Webinars can be an effective tool for patient education and engagement
subsections.justification: This slide talks about general marketing strategies in healthcare, not specific strategies MediConn can adopt. It discusses general industry trends.

conclusion: By aligning with emerging trends and leveraging innovative marketing strategies, MediConn can continue to attract new customers in the virtual healthcare space. Let's focus on these strategies to strengthen our market position and drive growth.
